title: Novosibirsk, Novosibirsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Novosibirsk is a city in Novosibirsk Oblast with a population of 1,620,000. The largest city in Siberia, a major scientific and industrial center with the renowned Akademgorodok research hub.
